titleStmt.title: SII 7.391: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 391. (A.R. No. 181-E of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE SITE OF A RUINED BASTI OPPOSITE THE KALI TEMPLE AT MANIGARAKERI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namassiddhēbhya[ḥ .*] śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyā trailōkyanāthasya śāśa
naṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1312 neya śukla saṁvatsarada vṛśabhamāsaṁ
modalāgi śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣegetappuvarāya
ragaṁḍḍa pū¨rvva dakṣiṇa paścima samudrādhipati śrīvīrahariharamahārāyaru da¨rmmadiṁda pṛ
thvīrājyaṁgeyuttiralu Ā harihararāyana nirūpadiṁ hoṁnuvurada mallappa Oḍeyaru
bārakūrarājyava nāḷuva kāladalli śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bayicayadaṁṇnāyakara maga sa¨rvva
ppadaṁṇnāyakaru bārakūra mūṟukēriya hiriyabastiya pā¨rśvadēvarige nityābhiṣēkapā
[dapadmā¨rccane ru]ṣiya Āhāradānakke mūlavāgikoṁḍu koṭṭa bāḷa catussīmeya viva
ra voḷage hāluḷigana baḷiya kōṭīsara bhāratana Aḷiya māṇinaṁdariya kaiyyaliṁ
mulava koṁḍa bāḷina vivara mūḍalu kuṁnneyakkala baḷiya holana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ ba
ḍagalu teṁkalu rāmanāyara bayala gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kula
beṁma holana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu A kuṁnekaṁbaḷiya gēṇi
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷḷa kuppegaṭina bayalu bittu
va gēṇinalu nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 12 Akki matta mane maneṭhāvu makke mara nekke ni
ḍilu bāvi hola nela nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa siddhasādhya Akṣīṇi Āgāmi voḷa
gāgi yi bāḷanu A¨rdhdhaparicchēdavāgi koṁḍu mūlaparicchēdavāgi yeṁna sahira
ṁṇyōdakadhārāpū¨rvvakavāgi Eṟadu koṭṭenu yi bāḷiṁge kuṁne kaṁbaḷige kaṭṭuṁdaṟe
mūḍe haṁnneraḍu haṇavore mū 11 yaṁ teṟu ga 1 I teṟanu tettu
ttu bāḷuvaru yi bāḷiṁge māṇinaṁdariya Akka sādhaka gōvitiya saṁbaṁdha bā
voḷage baṁdhugaḷu horage A(ṁ)nyaru Āru vakra naḍa vakrava kaḷadu bāḷi koḍu
koṭṭa Ālike sālikeya hiraṇya sirivūra hiraṁṇyanāyara mane ṭhāvu nāya
yiṁtappudakke Ā voppivara saṁjāta rudrapādadē baḷiya nāvaḷu Aḍapana
hiriyakkana baḷiya kuladerava baḷi būdha baḷiya haṁguḷa baḷiya
da dēvaru būdhaṇi yiṁtiva rubhayānmatadiṁ baradavaru dēvappaṁ
gaḷa maga nāyaṁṇaṁgaḷu Aka¨rttamāṇinaṁdariya suhastadoppa yī
ge rāmanāyara śāsanava barasikoṭṭanu . mattamī rāmanāyara magaḷu koṭṭi
vatiyū Ākaya kārasēne
da bāḷu siriyūroḷage keregaddeya
nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 2 hāne 29 Akṣaradallu
ttu yi bāḷanū A¨rththaparitsēdavāgikoṁḍu mūlaparitsēdavāgi
nāyakarige Ā kōṭiya I seṭṭeyū dhārāpū¨rvvakavā
gi yiṁda koṭṭenu yi bāḷiṁge teṟu yeraḍu
bāḷiṁge Oḷage baṁdhugaḷu hoṟage A(ṁ)nyaru Ārobbaru
du hēḷikoḍuva Ālike sālikeya haṇa siriyūra mā(ṁ)nya
Digital edition of SII 7.391 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
